parameters.content:
## Competitor Monitor (Free)
Watches competitor web pages and alerts you on **Discord/Slack** when they change - raw diff, no AI.

**How it works**
Fetch each page -> detect text changes -> post the diff to your webhook.

**How to set up**
Open the **Targets** node (yellow, section 1) and paste your webhook URL + the pages to watch. That is the only node to edit.

**Customization**
Change the schedule interval, or add more target pages.

_Want AI-written summaries + CSS-selector targeting? See the Pro version:_
https://rubenfabioux.vercel.app

## 1. Schedule & targets
Runs automatically **every 6 hours** (editable), then loads your list of competitor pages and your webhook URL from the **Targets** node. Each target becomes one item in the flow.

## 2. Check each page
Downloads each page's HTML, strips it to plain text, **hashes** it, and compares it to the last run. First run stores a baseline; after that it builds a raw **line-by-line diff** of new/removed lines.

## 3. Send alert
**Alert Needed?** checks whether a change was found. If yes, the raw diff is posted to your **Discord/Slack webhook**. No change means nothing is sent.
